relationships: ber:Yella ccek d ameqran dakken Tom ad yerbeḥ imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer Tmurt n Leqbayel imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Tom ad d-yuɣal s axxam imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Dan ad as-d-iɣer i Linda imalas ay d-yetteddun
ber:Ad giǧǧeɣ ɣer Tmura n Leqbayel imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Ad as-d-iɣer Dan i Linda imalas ay d-yetteddun
ber:Tom ad d-yeqqel imalas ay d-yetteddun
ber:Tom ad yili da imalas ay d-yetteddun
ber:Deg Tmurt n Leqbayel i yella imalas iεeddan
